channel.title: Xamarin Forms on Depechie’s outing
channel.description: Recent content in Xamarin Forms on Depechie’s outing

item.title: Xamarin Forms staggered view - Masonry
item.description:
Some story background

When developing mobile apps, you’ll often find different design trends that look great and sometimes you even want to adopt some of those trends in your own apps.

item.title: Xamarin Forms – Set entry clear icon color on iOS
item.description: Here is a small piece of code that you can use as a Xamarin Forms effect to hook into your entry. It allows changing the color of the clear icon that is available inside the native entry control of iOS ( when enabled ).

item.title: Xamarin Forms - Custom Visual State triggers and Control Templates
item.description: Not so long ago there was this little online event called Xamarin Expert Day that featured a bunch of awesome speakers. Now one talk got my full attention, it was the one from Hussain Abbasi about Supercharge You Custom Controls With Control Templates ( re-watch it here… ).
